name: BLESSED 'Dream Come True' Tee
description:
Material: 170 GSM poly mesh fabric designed for breathability and comfort.
Technology: Dri-FIT technology to wick away moisture during intense activities.
Fit: Unisex regular fit that suits all body types.
Design: All-over printing with a sporty, stylish look perfect for athletic wear.
